rules.label: Unpaid work
rules.description: The role explicitly says it is unpaid.

rules.label: Commission only
rules.description: The role pays only commission.

rules.label: Relocation required
rules.description: The role requires relocation.

rules.label: Salary not disclosed
rules.description: The advert does not give a clear salary signal.

rules.label: On-site only
rules.description: The role is tied to the office.

rules.label: Contract position
rules.description: The advert describes a fixed-term contract.

rules.label: Travel required
rules.description: The role expects regular travel.

rules.label: On-call duty
rules.description: The role includes on-call coverage.

rules.label: Overtime expected
rules.description: The advert signals long hours or weekend work.

rules.label: Remote-friendly
rules.description: The role supports remote work.

rules.label: Salary disclosed
rules.description: The advert gives a salary range or salary signal.

rules.label: Flexible hours
rules.description: The advert mentions flexible scheduling.

rules.label: Visa sponsorship
rules.description: The employer offers sponsorship.

rules.label: Growth opportunities
rules.description: The advert supports development and progression.

rules.label: Learning budget
rules.description: The company invests in learning and development.

rules.label: Equity
rules.description: The package includes equity or stock options.

rules.label: Health benefits
rules.description: The advert mentions health-related benefits.

rules.label: Pension
rules.description: The role includes pension or retirement support.

rules.label: Four-day week
rules.description: The company offers a shorter working week.

rules.label: Equipment provided
rules.description: The employer supplies work equipment or a stipend.
